title: The Heart of the Matter
writer: Lesley Storm, Ian Dalrymple, Graham Greene
actors: Trevor Howard, Elizabeth Allan, Maria Schell
plot: An unhappily married British security officer stationed in Sierra Leone during World War II falls in love with a young Austrian woman and starts an affair. He soon starts feeling guilty.
awards: Nominated for 4 BAFTA 1 win & 5 nominations total
